description.default: AAD Object ID (GUID) of the CCI Director of Equipment. Used for director-level approval routing and insurance lapse notifications.

label.description: AAD Object ID (GUID) of the CCI Director of Equipment. Used for director-level approval routing and insurance lapse notifications.

hint.default: Find in Azure AD (Entra ID) > Users > [Director name] > Object ID. Must be a GUID.

label.description: Find in Azure AD (Entra ID) > Users > [Director name] > Object ID. Must be a GUID.
